source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.official_english: This is a place to set rules
topics.why_hot: A quote from a leader emphasizing rule of law, widely shared on social media.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the importance of rule of law in China's governance.

topics.chinese_topic: “你只是高考完了 不是家里发财了”
topics.official_english: You just finished Gaokao, your family didn't get rich
topics.why_hot: A viral reminder to students not to overspend after exams, resonating with many families.
topics.share_angle: Explore the financial pressures and expectations on Chinese students post-Gaokao.

topics.chinese_topic: 被骂了十年的48队世界杯 突然变香了
topics.official_english: 48-team World Cup, criticized for a decade, suddenly becomes popular
topics.why_hot: FIFA's expansion to 48 teams was long criticized but now fans see benefits.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the changing perception of the expanded World Cup format.

topics.chinese_topic: 这些投档录取问题 志愿填报前必看
topics.official_english: Key admission issues to know before filling in college preferences
topics.why_hot: Gaokao results are out, students and parents urgently need guidance on college applications.
topics.share_angle: Provide tips for navigating the Chinese college admission system.

topics.chinese_topic: 网警查处编造传播涉农网络谣言案
topics.official_english: Cyber police investigate case of fabricating and spreading agricultural rumors online
topics.why_hot: Highlights efforts to combat misinformation affecting rural areas.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the impact of online rumors on agriculture and rural communities.

topics.chinese_topic: 小米电视就误报“北京地震”预警致歉
topics.official_english: Xiaomi TV apologizes for falsely reporting 'Beijing earthquake' alert
topics.why_hot: A false earthquake alert caused panic; Xiaomi's apology draws attention to tech reliability.
topics.share_angle: Examine the challenges of emergency alert systems and public trust.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国男篮热身赛险胜荷兰 杨瀚森7分
topics.official_english: Chinese men's basketball team narrowly beats Netherlands in warm-up; Yang Hansen scores 7
topics.why_hot: Basketball fans follow the national team's preparation for upcoming tournaments.
topics.share_angle: Review the team's performance and prospects for international competitions.

topics.chinese_topic: 合资燃油车大幅降价仍滞销
topics.official_english: Joint-venture fuel vehicles see sharp price cuts but still struggle to sell
topics.why_hot: Reflects the declining demand for traditional fuel cars amid EV rise.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the shift in China's auto market towards electric vehicles.
